name: RTL Hebrew UI Design
description: Build right-to-left (RTL) Hebrew user interfaces with React, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js. Includes RTL layout patterns, bidirectional text handling, Hebrew typography, and accessible RTL components.
prompt: Build right-to-left (RTL) Hebrew user interfaces with React, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js. Includes RTL layout patterns, bidirectional text handling, Hebrew typography, and accessible RTL components.
